concerns.text: FR-001 (ingest problem statements from ASSISTments/Khan Academy) has no explicit story anchor. While it supports US-1's goal of generating explanations, the spec should explicitly reference US-1 or clarify that this requirement is foundational to the explanation generation story.

FR-009 (simulate at least 2,000 students per condition) has no explicit story anchor. This appears to support US-2 (Simulate Student Interaction) and US-3 (Comparative Analysis), but the spec should explicitly reference which story it serves to avoid orphaned requirement status.

FR-010 defines calibration success as RMSE *difference* across conditions ≤0.02, while SC-007 specifies absolute RMSE ≤0.15. These are different metrics for the same calibration step (US-5). The spec should clarify whether both thresholds must be satisfied or if one supersedes the other.
SC-003 (effect-size CI width ≤0.20) has no explicit story anchor. This appears to support US-3 (Comparative Analysis), but the spec should explicitly reference US-3 to ensure traceability.

SC-005 (≥99% simulated logs have all three fields) has no explicit story anchor. This appears to support US-2 (Simulate Student Interaction), but the spec should explicitly reference US-2 to ensure traceability.
